name: cc-plugins
description: Shared plugins: git workflow commands, release and deploy tooling, and more

plugins.name: git-commands
plugins.description: Git workflow commands for watching PR CI checks, fixing failures, and merging PRs

plugins.name: release
plugins.description: Software release commands for creating semver-tagged releases with changelog generation and GoReleaser

plugins.name: deploy
plugins.description: Deploy commands for creating date-based releases that trigger Docker image builds and site deployments

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Commands for submitting implementation plans to Codex, Kimi K2.5, and CodeRabbit for AI review and autonomous feedback incorporation

plugins.name: cursor
plugins.description: Delegate coding tasks and code reviews to the Cursor agent CLI from Claude Code
